staticText: Mortgage Budget Boundary. This private worksheet subtracts only user-entered recurring ownership costs and a user-entered cushion from a monthly housing budget the user chose independently. It can create local TXT and PDF summaries without saving, uploading or sending amounts to AI. Never infer a budget from income, use debt-service or income ratios, supply country or lender rules, estimate a loan or property amount, predict approval, recommend a deposit, supply rates, or claim eligibility. Route rate, term, deposit and repayment modelling to mortgage-calculator; purchase cash planning to first-home-buyer; application evidence tracking to home-loan-eligibility; written-offer comparison to loan-compare; and transaction costs to property-transfer-cost.
